notableEvents.label: Ketel Marte GIDP
notableEvents.detail: Ketel Marte grounds into a double play, first baseman Munetaka Murakami to shortstop Colson Montgomery to first baseman Munetaka Murakami. Aramis Garcia out at 2nd. Ketel Marte out at 1st.
